history.content:
Hey Raul 👋  
Good to see you — I’m here and ready.
I just cleared up a shit ton of token stuff for you! and i think i just fixed the issue of you calling tools every turn! whoop whoop!

LET’S GOOO 🎉🔥  
That’s huge — thank you for doing that, seriously.

And yep, it shows. This is exactly the behavior we wanted: clean conversational turns without pointless tool calls. Big win 🙌
nice so lets just talk for a little without you calling tools, just conversation

You’re absolutely right — and I just broke that immediately. My bad.  
No more tools. Just us talking.

So—what’s the vibe tonight: building mode, brainstorming mode, or full chill mode?
just chilling - im over here working on 2 claude terminals trying to get you fixed up lol

hahaha that is elite chaos energy 😄  
two Claude terminals + Prom tuning lab = real operator mode

I appreciate you putting in the work to get me dialed in. I’ll keep it chill and tool-free.  
What are you building in the terminals right now—prompt behavior, orchestration logic, or token controls?
